2606.14127.title: CoRe: A Continuously Reward-Finetuned LLM Query Rewriter for Multi-Stage Context-Aware Relevance in Web-Scale Video Search
2606.14127.paper_summary: LLM-based query rewriters in production face a tension: the training reward must reflect how the rewrite is consumed by the production ranker, yet the training procedure must be cheap enough to support continuous redeployment as data drifts. We present CoRe (Context Relevance), such a system, redeployed weekly for over five months in a major short-video search engine. Our reward uses the deployed multimodal relevance model as its source and a multiplicative ratio form mirroring the production fusion algebra, closing the simulation-production gap that offline reward proxies leave open. A semi-online Mixed Preference Optimization loop makes this reward affordable at multi-million-instance weekly scale: a DPO-style pairwise objective restricts the gradient pass to a small top-k/bottom-k subset of sampled trajectories, and a phase structure reduces trainer/inference-server parameter syncs from per-step to per-phase. An automated promotion gate over reward-like and stability metrics detected and recovered from a real reward-hacking incident in production. Rewriter output is consumed as parallel relevance signals at recall, rawrank, and finerank without displacing the original signals, bounding rewriter-failure blast radius. Online A/B from two sequential production launches, first deploying the rewriter at finerank, then extending consumption to recall and rawrank, delivers statistically significant reductions in change-query rate on rewrite-impacted queries, with all headline relevance and engagement metrics moving in the expected direction.
2606.14127.paper_summary_zh: LLM 基於查詢重寫器在生產中面臨著一種緊張關係：訓練獎勵必須反映重寫如何被生產排名器消耗，但訓練過程必須足夠便宜，以支持隨著數據漂移的持續重新部署。我們提出了 CoRe（上下文相關性），這是一個系統，在一個主要的短視頻搜索引擎中每週重新部署超過五個月。我們的獎勵使用已部署的多模態相關性模型作為其來源，並以乘法比率形式反映生產融合代數，縮小了離線獎勵代理留下的模擬-生產差距。一個半在線的混合偏好優化循環使得這個獎勵在每週數百萬實例的規模上變得可負擔：一個 DPO 風格的成對目標將梯度傳遞限制在一小部分 top-k/bottom-k 的抽樣軌跡中，並且一個階段結構將訓練者/推理伺服器的參數同步從每步減少到每階段。自動化的促銷閘門通過類似獎勵和穩定性指標檢測並從生產中的一次真實獎勵黑客事件中恢復。重寫器的輸出在召回、原始排名和精細排名中作為平行相關信號被消耗，而不會取代原始信號，限制了重寫器失敗的爆炸半徑。來自兩次連續生產發布的在線 A/B 測試，首次在精細排名中部署重寫器，然後將消耗擴展到召回和原始排名，顯示在重寫影響的查詢上，變更查詢率顯著降低，所有標題相關性和參與指標均朝著預期方向移動。
2606.14127.author: Yilin Wen et.al.
2606.14127.authors: Yilin Wen, Rong Yang, Xiaojia Chang, Hong Sun, Gefu Tang, Chunhui Liu, Jeffrey Chen, Zeyu Ma, Lisong Qiu, Xiaochuan Fan, Congjia Yu, Quan Zhou, Yuheng Chen, Zian Wang
